name: AIssisted Consulting

founder_operator.name: PJ
founder_operator.role: Founder/operator and practical AI implementation partner

notes: AIssisted Consulting is based in Ocala, Florida.
The site describes help for Central Florida, North Central Florida, and remote clients across the United States.
This feed does not create extra city, county, or state service claims.

primary_audiences.fit: Owners who need practical help with intake, scheduling, follow-up, reporting, owner visibility, and reviewable workflows.
Households with setup, privacy, everyday use, and boundary questions about AI tools.

positioning: Plain-English implementation for one useful workflow first.
Softer sales posture with practical guides, examples, and clear next steps.
Small-business workflow help and conservative family AI guidance.
The public booking route can reserve a 60-minute founder-led consult through the same-origin booking backend and Stripe Checkout when deployment credentials are configured.

booking.policy: The reservation deposit is non-refundable and credited once toward service if the visitor becomes a customer.
booking.confirmation_boundary: A slot is not confirmed until Stripe payment succeeds and the booking backend finalizes the record.

privacy_control_posture: AI should support people without handing away sensitive control.
Customer relationships, family decisions, and important exceptions need human review.
Sensitive data boundaries should be named before a tool or workflow is added.
wrong_fit_boundaries: Standing in for staff, parents, caregivers, teachers, or professionals.
Bypassing privacy, security, legal, medical, financial, school-policy, or compliance review.
Unapproved communication, commitments, transactions, booking, payment, or external writes.
Outcome promises around AI visibility, lead flow, revenue, safety, or rankings.
publication_boundary: This support file summarizes public site facts and declared local/deployable agent-surface capabilities. It does not represent live AVOS testing, crawler changes, credentialed private workflows, direct card collection, CRM/email writes, analytics writes, or destructive actions.

agent_surface.contact_submission: Agent-assisted contact submission is declared only through the same-origin contact endpoint with human approval, consent, Idempotency-Key, duplicate suppression, and audit records.
agent_surface.booking_checkout: Agent-assisted booking checkout is declared only through the same-origin booking endpoint with human approval, policy acceptance, checkout consent, exact amount/currency/policy confirmation, Idempotency-Key, slot conflict checks, audit records, and Stripe Checkout.
